zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah King於1650年5月26日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可克里斯蒂 邱奇時，她的父親Roger King34歲，母親Anne Foster30歲。她於大約1668年與Andrew Williamson在美國維吉尼亞州米德萊可可利斯丘其結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1697年2月6日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州阿可馬可米德萊可享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah King于1650年5月26日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可克里斯蒂 邱奇时，她的父亲Roger King34岁，母亲Anne Foster30岁。她于大约1668年与Andrew Williamson在美国弗吉尼亚州米德萊可可利斯丘其结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1697年2月6日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州阿可馬可米德萊可享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: King
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English king ‘king’ (Old English cyning, cyng), perhaps acquired by someone with kingly qualities or as a pageant name by someone who had acted the part of a king or had been chosen as the master of ceremonies or ‘king’ of an event such as a tournament, festival or folk ritual. In North America, the surname King has absorbed several European cognates and equivalents with the same meaning, for example German König (see Koenig ) and Küng, French Roy , Slovenian, Croatian, or Serbian Kralj , Polish Krol . It is also very common among African Americans. It is also found as an artificial Jewish surname.
English: occasionally from the Middle English personal name King, originally an Old English nickname from the vocabulary word cyning, cyng ‘king’.
Irish: adopted for a variety of names containing the syllable rí (which means ‘king’ in Irish).

variants.name: Kingdon
meanings: English (southwestern, especially Devon): habitational name from Higher Kingdon in Alverdiscott, or from Kendon in North Bovey, both in Devon. Both are named in Old English from cyning ‘king’ (see King ) or cyne- ‘royal’ + dūn ‘hill’.

variants.name: Chief
meanings: Native American: translation into English (and shortening) of a personal name based on a word, such as Cheyenne veho, meaning ‘chief’. See also King 4.

variants.name: Koenig
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Hans, Erwin, Dieter, Frieda, Monika, Reinhard, Egon, Fritz, Heinz, Wilhelm.

German (mainly König) and Jewish (Ashkenazic; also König): from Middle High German künic, German König ‘king’, hence a German nickname for a servant or retainer of a king (for example, a farmer on a royal demesne), or alternatively a status name for the head of a craftmen's guild, or a society of sharpshooters or minstrels. As a Jewish surname, it is artificial, one of several such Ashkenazic names based on European titles of nobility or royalty. The surname Koenig is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and Poland. In eastern Germany the surname König is in part a Germanized form (translation into German) of Sorbian Kral ‘king’. Similarly, in Czechia, Poland, Slovenia, and Croatia, it was often applied as a translation into German of Czech, Polish, Slovenian, and Croatian cognates Král (see Kral ), Król (see Krol ), and Kralj , respectively. Compare Konig .

variants.name: Kings
meanings: English (Worcestershire): variant of King , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. — Note: The population figure published by the US Census Bureau for this surname in the year 2000 is as high as 434, while the figure for 2010 is supposedly lower than 100.

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah King was born on 26 May 1650, in Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, her father, Roger King, was 34 and her mother, Anne Foster, was 30. She married Andrew Williamson about 1668, in Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginia, United States. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 6 February 1697, in Middlesex, Accomack, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah King est née le 26 mai 1650, à Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Roger King, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Anne Foster, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Andrew Williamson environ 1668, à Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 6 février 1697, à Middlesex, Accomack, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah King am 26. Mai 1650 in Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger King 34 und ihre Mutter Anne Foster 30. Sie hat um 1668 in Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten Andrew Williamson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. Februar 1697 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Middlesex, Accomack, Virginia, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah King è nata il il 26 maggio 1650 nel Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, sua padre, Roger King, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Anne Foster, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Andrew Williamson circa 1668, nel Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 6 febbraio 1697, nel Middlesex, Accomack, Virginia, British Colonial America, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Kingが1650年5月26日にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ミッドレセックスチリスト チャーチで生まれた時，父Roger Kingは34歳，母Anne Fosterは30歳であった。約1668年にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州ミッドレセックスチリストチャーチでAndrew Williamsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1697年2月6日にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州アッコイマックミッドレセックスで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah King(이)가 1650년 5월 26일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 미들레세스 크리스트 c후르치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger King(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Foster(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 대략 1668년 미국 버지니아 주 미들레세스 크리스트c후르치에서 Andrew Williamson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1697년 2월 6일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 악코맥 미들레세스에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah King nasceu em 26 de maio de 1650, em Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, seu pai, Roger King, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Anne Foster, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Andrew Williamson aproximadamente 1668, em Christchurch, Middlesex, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 6 de fevereiro de 1697, em Middlesex, Accomack, Virginia, British Colonial America, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah King родилась 26 мая 1650 г. в местности краист чурч, миддлесекс, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Roger King было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Anne Foster, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Andrew Williamson около 1668 г. в местности крисчурч, миддлесекс, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 6 февраля 1697 г. в местности миддлесекс, аккомакк, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sarah King nació el 26 de mayo de 1650, en Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, su papá, Roger King, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Anne Foster, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Andrew Williamson aproximadamente 1668, en Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginia, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 6 de febrero de 1697, en Middlesex, Accomack, Virginia, British Colonial America, a la edad de 46 años.
